name: claude-wiki-plugins
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-wiki plugin family

plugins.name: claude-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Requires kepano/obsidian-skills (hard dependency). Pre-release: setup-claude-wiki + add-page + lint-vault shipped; query-wiki arrives next before the v0.1.0 stable cut.
